heading: Office of Naval Research: appropriations; time limit
label: 8023 Office of Naval Research: appropriations; time limit
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5152(less 2d sentence).5 U.S.C. 475d(a)(a) (less 2d sentence), .Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 727, § 560 Stat. 780.5 U.S.C. 475d(b)(b), .Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 727, § 560 Stat. 780The authorization to make appropriations for the Office of Naval Research is omitted as unnecessary. children.text: conduct of research and development work in Government facilities; and
conduct of research and development work under contracts with individuals, corporations, and educational or scientific institutions.

children.label: b
children.text: Sums appropriated for the purposes of this section, if obligated during the fiscal year for which appropriated, remain available for expenditure for four years after the end of that fiscal year. Any balance not spent after that four-year period shall be carried to the surplus fund and covered into the Treasury.
